violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (bandsaw) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took unit out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

Various food items and bags of ice were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food (including ice) must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025
Inspector observed ice machine lid in poor repair (crack/chipped plastic). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris: - ice machine COS, - 2 door cooler, - display cooler, - grill and shelves under grill, - prep unit. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink near the 3 bay sink area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. PIC refilled. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

Per interview of staff, potato cutter and ban saw are only washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the end of the day. The surfaces of equipment that contacts time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as meats and cheeses must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized at least every four hours. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took ice machine out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

Sliced potatoes, which was prepared in the night before, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

Empanadas and rice were observed held between (111-128) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

Potatoes were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Inspector observed sliced potatoes cooling in a prep unit in containers greater than four inches deep with a cover. PIC placed container in the walk-in freezer. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025
Inspector observed a digital food thermometer that did not turn on. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025
Inspector observed an accumulation of dead insect around potted indoor plants. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025
Various food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

Inspector observed a heavy accumulation of frost and ice build up around right fan blade of the walk-in freezer (not spinning). Inspector observed ice machine lid in poor repair (crack/chipped plastic). New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -2 door cooler, -display coolers, -potato cutter, -shelves under grills, -prep unit, -prep table. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025
Inspector observed an accumulation of leaf litter, trash, and other debris around refuse area. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025
Inspector observed a heavy accumulation of grease and other debris on grease disposal receptacle. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

Inspector observed some clutter in the side storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

At the time of inspection, PIC could not provide parasite destruction records. Parasite destruction records of freezing of fish for parasite destruction must be available. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024

The door to the outside, located in the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024
Walk-in freezer was not in good repair, observed an accumulation of ice buildup. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024

The floors in the back storage area has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024

Food contact surfaces of ice machine were observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine taken out of service, must be cleaned and sanitized prior to use. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2023
Partition is needed in between fish prep sink and three bay sink to prevent sources of contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023

A hose is connected to the faucet at the wash area. This faucet is lacking a backflow prevention device. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023
Vent hood lights observed with no light bulbs. Physical facilities must be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023
